name: MongoDB MCP
description: Official MongoDB MCP server. AI agents query, analyze, and manage MongoDB databases with schema inspection, aggregation pipelines, and Atlas Vector Search support.

skills.name: Database Query
skills.description: Execute MongoDB find queries and aggregation pipelines against any collection via MCP tools

skills.name: Schema Inspection
skills.description: Inspect collection schemas and index configurations to understand data structure before querying

skills.name: Atlas Vector Search
skills.description: Run semantic similarity searches using MongoDB Atlas Vector Search for RAG pipeline integration
